title: Countries You Can Safely Invest In
description: Find countries where average call duration exceeds the global average.
constraints: id is the primary key of Person
country_code is the first 3 characters of phone_number
A call involves both caller and callee — each call contributes to both their countries
(caller_id, callee_id) is the primary key of Calls
key_concept: Multi-table join + HAVING AVG > (scalar subquery for global average).

hints.L1: Get each country's average call duration. Compare to global average (subquery returning one number).
hints.L3: SELECT co.name AS country FROM Person p JOIN Calls c ON p.id IN (c.caller_id, c.callee_id) JOIN Country co ON LEFT(p.phone_number,3) = co.country_code GROUP BY co.name HAVING AVG(c.duration) > (SELECT AVG(duration) FROM Calls)

optimal_solution:
SELECT co.name AS country
FROM Person p
JOIN Calls c ON p.id IN (c.caller_id, c.callee_id)
JOIN Country co ON LEFT(p.phone_number, 3) = co.country_code
GROUP BY co.name
HAVING AVG(c.duration) > (SELECT AVG(duration) FROM Calls);
